shallow_tree.definition: topo74 M16 parent array with the #259 scratch-suspect interior nodes [6,9,10] PRUNED; remaining = spine(9) + first-level rho2 branch-hit(4) = 13 nodes.

step_model.model: verify-step marginal is PER-ROW (per-node) in the M<=32 flat regime: lawine #153 step(M) grows via per-candidate GEMM/sampler/argmax rows, and denken #85 measured (on the EXACT topo74 M16 tree) centroid_sampler ~M^0.75 / verify_argmax ~M^0.94 while attention AMORTIZES (M8->M32 1.06x). The shallow tree has the SAME max-depth (8) and max-branch (3) as the full tree, so ALL the saving is the 3 fewer verify ROWS, none from depth. step_shallow = built_step - 3 * per-node-marginal (anchored to the banked built step; lawine curve supplies only the relative per-node shape).

denken85_corroboration.note: verify-side non-GEMM overhead is per-row (+2.18us/node M8->M16); attention amortizes (1.06x) -> cost is node-count-bound, not depth-bound.

crossover.note: the shallow tree needs only a 0.697% step reduction to clear 500; the banked per-node verify cost predicts 1.928% from dropping 3 of 16 rows -- so it clears unless > 63.8% of the verify marginal is fixed/depth-bound (denken #85 refutes: attention amortizes 1.06x, marginal is per-row).

serve_lever_secondary.source: kanna #260 greedy-safe serve-layer tau tie-breaker (additive, NOT load-bearing)
serve_lever_secondary.note: SECONDARY / tau-term -- does NOT carry the headline; the headline rests on the real-KV-confirmed E[T]=4.3003 at the model-compute step_shallow.

verdict.headline: FIDELITY-SAFE ROUTE TO 500 EXISTS (Path-A-lite clears at its own cheaper step)
verdict.one_line_read: a fidelity-SAFE route to 500 EXISTS at the shallow tree's own cheaper step -- land #245's deep-branch reconstruction is OPTIONAL UPSIDE.

imports_unchanged.note: BASELINE 481.53, the 520.95 lambda=1 ceiling, K_cal=125.268, lambda-bar 0.9780, the 4.3305 full-step floor and the #259 confirmed_et 4.3003 are IMPORTED EXACTLY and UNCHANGED. This leg re-PRICES the banked projection at a cheaper step; it moves no measurement. land #245 owns the live build.

handoff: the fidelity-safe 13-node shallow tree (spine + first-level rho2, no scratch-suspect deep branch-interior) has E[T]=4.3003 at step_shallow=1.064036 ms, whose E_T floor is 4.2470, so it clears 500 at implied 506.27 TPS -- meaning a fidelity-RISK-FREE route to 500 exists and land #245's deep-branch reconstruction is optional upside.
scope: LOCAL CPU-only analytic composition of banked figures. Prices whether the fidelity-SAFE 13-node shallow sub-tree (spine + first-level rho2, dropping the scratch-suspect deep branch-interior) clears 500 at its OWN cheaper verify step -- by re-deriving the E_T floor at step_shallow and checking confirmed_et=4.3003 against IT. No GPU / vLLM / HF Job / submission / served-file change / official draw. BASELINE stays 481.53; adds 0 TPS. land #245 owns the live measurement. NOT a launch. NOT open2.
